headline: Sherwin-Williams Beat Earnings Forecasts. Why the Stock Is Sliding.
summary: Sherwin-Williams  painted a sobering picture of customer demand as a bleak outlook overshadowed stronger-than-expected sales and profit.  Sherwin-Williams  posted adjusted earnings of $2.35 a share, ahead of the $2.27 analysts had projected.  Shares initially headed higher after the report but reversed course in the regular session, dropping 2.2%.

headline: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: Jim Jaye: Thank you, and good morning to everyone.  The Sherwin-Williams Company delivered strong sales in a quarter characterized by heightened global uncertainty and persistent demand softness in most end markets.  Consolidated sales grew by a high single-digit percentage inclusive of a low single-digit contribution from the Suvenil acquisition.

headline: Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) Posts Better-Than-Expected Sales In Q1 CY2026
summary: Paint and coating manufacturer Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) reported Q1 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, with sales up 6.8% year on year to $5.67 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.35 per share was 3.6% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
